title: Alert
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Alert wrapper using Schema-backed variants and pure class maps.

registry.reason: shadcn Alert uses the local class composition helper instead of CVA.
The Alert action example composes the local shadcn Button registry item.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper.
Provides Effect Schema literals for Alert variant and direction options.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin CVA usage is replaced by Effect Schema literals and pure local class maps.
Origin icon examples are represented by local inline SVGs in this batch.
Origin language selector runtime dependency is replaced by local RTL example constants and origin fixture aliases.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.description: Alert with custom amber color classes.

AlertRtl
examples.description: RTL Alert layout example with local Arabic strings.

deviations.summary: Icon examples use local inline SVGs instead of origin icon packages.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. Local SVGs preserve the inline icon DOM role and visual footprint for Alert examples without adding icon registry items.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic example constants preserve the default RTL rendered output while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.
